top3.sql:
WITH user_posts AS (
    SELECT 
        p.Id AS PostId,
        p.Score,
        p.ViewCount,
        p.AnswerCount,
        p.CommentCount,
        p.FavoriteCount,
        u.DisplayName
    FROM posts p
    JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
    WHERE u.DisplayName IN ('Harvey Motulsky', 'Noah Snyder')
),
popularity AS (
    SELECT 
        DisplayName,
        SUM(Score) AS total_score,
        SUM(ViewCount) AS total_views,
        SUM(AnswerCount) AS total_answers,
        SUM(CommentCou...

SELECT 
    u.DisplayName,
    p.Id AS PostId,
    p.Score,
    p.ViewCount,
    p.AnswerCount,
    p.CommentCount,
    p.FavoriteCount,
    COALESCE(SUM(v.BountyAmount), 0) + p.Score + p.ViewCount / 100 + p.AnswerCount * 5 + p.CommentCount * 2 + p.FavoriteCount * 10 AS PopularityScore
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
LEFT JOIN votes v ON p.Id = v.PostId
WHERE u.DisplayName IN ('Harvey Motulsky', 'Noah Snyder')
GROUP BY u.DisplayName, p.Id, p.Score, p.ViewCount, p.AnswerCount, p...
